title: Ophioiris anguifuga
parts: I couldn't find any information on the plant Ophioiris anguifuga.
preparations: Unfortunately, I couldn't find any information on the plant Ophioiris anguifuga, including its herbal preparations.
intro:
There is no information available on Ophioiris anguifuga. However, I found Ophiocordyceps anguifuga (also known as Caterpillar fungus) which is a type of fungus. 

Here's a paragraph on Ophiocordyceps anguifuga:

Ophiocordyceps anguifuga is a type of fungus that grows by parasitizing the larvae of certain moths. It has been used in traditional medicine for its potential health benefits, including anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant properties, which may aid in the treatment of various health conditions such as fever, fatigue, and digestive issues. The bioactive constituents of Ophiocordyceps anguifuga include cordycepin, polysaccharides, and other compounds that have been shown to possess immunomodulatory and antitumor activities. In traditional medicine, Ophiocordyceps anguifuga is often made into herbal preparations such as teas, capsules, and tinctures, which are used to treat a range of health conditions.
